overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt running through a stormy night landscape. The character traverses a dirt path through forested hills before veering into an open field toward distant ruins, with heavy rain and lightning illuminating the dark clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested dirt path in stormy hills

events.description: lightning bolt strikes in the distance illuminating the storm clouds

agents.ego_description: Geralt running along the winding dirt path through the forested terrain

entered.detail: narrow winding trail through the grassy hills
scattered trees lining both sides of the path
dark heavy storm clouds covering the night sky with occasional lightning

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt running along a narrow dirt path through a stormy forest at night. Rain falls steadily as lightning occasionally illuminates the dark clouds overhead. The path is flanked by scattered deciduous trees and grassy terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open hillside trail with distant views

events.description: bright lightning flash briefly illuminates the entire landscape

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the path as the terrain opens up to reveal distant hills

entered.detail: faint lights from a distant settlement visible on the horizon
rolling grassy hills extending into the distance

segments.scene_description: The path opens up to reveal wider vistas of rolling grassy hills as the character continues running. The storm intensifies with bright lightning flashes, and distant village lights become visible on the left horizon. The trees thin out as the terrain becomes more open.

events.description: character turns sharply right and leaves the dirt path to cross the open grass field

agents.ego_description: veering off the established path to explore the open field toward distant lights

entered.detail: tall wild grass covering the open hillside

segments.scene_description: Leaving the dirt path behind, the character turns right into an open grass field. The terrain becomes wilder with tall grass underfoot, while the distant village lights remain visible ahead. The storm continues with rain and occasional lightning strikes.

events.description: approaching abandoned wooden ruins and stone foundations in the field

agents.ego_description: moving through tall grass toward the abandoned structures in the distance

entered.detail: decayed wooden structures and broken fences of an abandoned building
stone remnants of old foundations scattered in the grass

segments.scene_description: The character approaches abandoned ruins in the overgrown field, with decayed wooden structures and stone foundations becoming visible through the rain. The terrain is dotted with scattered trees and broken fences as the storm continues to rage overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy nocturnal forest that gradually opens into a wild, rain-swept field of ruins. It begins with Geralt running along a narrow dirt path flanked by deciduous trees, where steady rain is punctuated by flashes of lightning illuminating the dark clouds. As the path widens, the forest thins out to reveal rolling grassy hills and the distant glow of village lights on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the trail behind, turning right into an open expanse of tall, wild grass under the raging storm. Finally, the camera approaches a cluster of abandoned ruins, moving past decayed wooden structures and stone foundations scattered across the overgrown terrain.
